rows.prompt: List all segment audiences connected to the destination named 'SMS Opt-In', showing audienceId, name, totalProfiles, createdTime, updatedTime, and used in other audience count for each audience. Remove any row limit from the results.

rows.compiled_sql: SELECT "dim_segment"."SEGMENTID", "dim_segment"."NAME" FROM "dim_segment" JOIN "hkg_br_segment_target" ON "dim_segment"."SEGMENTID" = "hkg_br_segment_target"."SEGMENTID" JOIN "dim_target" ON "hkg_br_segment_target"."TARGETID" = "dim_target"."TARGETID" WHERE "dim_target"."NAME" = 'SMS Opt-In' LIMIT 50
